intro: Intense and visceral action shooter where every shot counts
description:
Prepare for the collapse of civilization in Dead Patrol, an intense and visceral action shooter where every shot counts. In a city consumed by chaos, you take on the role of an elite patrol officer sent into the most dangerous zones to face relentless hordes of the undead and reclaim overrun sectors.
With fast-paced, tactical combat, extremely responsive controls, and a powerful arsenal, Dead Patrol delivers a brutal and straightforward survival experience. Strategic movement, fluid weapon switching, and smart use of the environment are essential to stay alive amid the urban chaos.
